columns.extraction_plan: The median overall survival for the SOC + AAP (treatment) group is reported in the "Results" section of the text.
The median overall survival for the SOC-alone (control) group is reported in the "Results" section of the text.

The PDF reports outcomes by "metastatic disease risk group using LATITUDE criteria" (Table 3), classifying patients as "High-risk" or "Low-risk". It does not explicitly report median OS for "High volume" patients defined by CHAARTED criteria. While CHAARTED criteria are mentioned in the discussion, the results are not presented using this classification. For the "High-risk" (LATITUDE) group, only Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST) and 5-year survival percentages are provided, not median OS.
